texto: somewhere between hello and I want this job, he'd lost all business sense and hired the pretty lady just because she wanted the job. Was it because she turned him into a seventeen-year-old with raging hormones?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Dolores Wilson que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “somewhere between hello and I want this job, he'd lost all business sense and hired the pretty la…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, hilarious, because, com foco em reflexao.
